list.pageDescription: Cover letters generated from your career data and a specific job posting you analyzed.

emptyState.title: No cover letters yet
emptyState.description: Generate one from a job posting you've already analyzed in Job Analyzer.

new.pageDescription: Pick a job posting you've already analyzed — the letter is grounded in that posting's requirements and your career data.
new.noAnalyses: You haven't analyzed any job postings yet. Analyze one in Job Analyzer first, then come back here to generate a cover letter for it.
new.extraNotesPlaceholder: e.g. a specific reason you're excited about this company, a mutual connection, something not in your profile…
